title: ALM Entity Migration Status Report
description: Comprehensive status of all alm_ entity migrations from legacy SQL through staging to Dataverse

sections.name: Entity Inventory
sections.description: Complete list of all alm_ prefixed entities with their current migration status, linked ADO work items, and notes on blockers or dependencies

gather.instruction: Extract all entities with logicalName starting with 'alm_'. Return array of {logicalName, entitySetName, primaryId, attributeCount: number of attributes}
List all pipeline names that reference alm_ entities in their SQL queries or parameters

criteria.description: Table with entity name, migration status, associated pipeline, linked ADO item, and notes
At least one row per entity found in schema index
Each entity has a status value from: Complete, In Progress, Not Started, Blocked, N/A
Entities with status 'Blocked' must have a note explaining the blocker

sections.name: Pipeline Coverage
sections.description: Summary of which pipelines handle which entities, run frequency, and recent success/failure rates

gather.instruction: For each pipeline, extract: name, entities referenced in SQL, any ForEach loops or parameterized entity lists

criteria.description: Table mapping pipelines to entities with recent run info
Every entity from the Entity Inventory section is covered by at least one pipeline, or explicitly marked as 'No pipeline' with explanation

sections.name: Open Issues
sections.description: Active bugs and blockers from ADO related to the migration

gather.instruction: List recent error files with timestamps and brief descriptions of the failures

criteria.description: Table of active bugs with entity association
Each bug is linked to a specific entity from the Entity Inventory, or marked as 'cross-cutting' with explanation
